description: scholar-slides regression benchmark — real papers built end-to-end. Every code change is re-run through run_benchmark.mjs (integrity QA gate + PPTX content parity + aesthetic layout-mix) across all entries, so a fix that helps one deck cannot silently regress another. Decks live under out/ (build products, not committed): if an entry is MISSING, rebuild it with `node scripts/build_deck.mjs <dir>/deck.json && node scripts/render_deck.mjs <dir>/deck/deck.html && node scripts/export_pptx.mjs <dir>/deck.json` — every deck.json under out/ is the durable spec. Grow toward 15+ cross-discipline papers (CV / NLP / medical / theory / biology).
